schema.name: edit
schema.description: Replaces text in a file under the NDX virtual root. The old_string must match exactly once unless replace_all is true.

file_path.description: Container absolute path under the NDX virtual root, or path relative to the project root.

old_string.description: Exact literal text to replace. Empty string creates a new file.

replace_all.description: Replace all occurrences instead of requiring a single match.
